title: LEAPPing with LAVA
author: Kevin Pagano
excerpt: LAVA is another way to view reports created out of iLEAPP, ALEAPP, RLEAPP, and VLEAPP. Here is a look at the new features that make it stand out from the HTML reporting it is set to replace.

title: Website Update - Search, Better Docs, and More
author: Alexis Brignoni
excerpt: The LEAPPs website got a big update. Here is a rundown of everything that changed, from site-wide search to improved docs and a more consistent footer across every page.

title: Introducing the LEAPPs Blog
author: Alexis Brignoni
excerpt: The LEAPPs project now has a blog — a place for artifact deep dives, tool updates, and community write-ups. Here's how it works and how you can contribute.
